meaning: n.(织品中的)多色菱形花纹,多色菱形图案的袜子adj.(织品中)有多色菱形图案的
examples: Oxford professor Michael Argyle recently finished a 15-year study that explored what makes people happy.

Williamson has been out of management since being axed by Plymouth Argyle in September 2005.
"He has got great potential and wants to do well, " Sturrock told the Argyle website.
